issues.detail: Skill is vendor-locked to GCP, not cross-platform.

scenarios.name: Payments API production readiness review
scenarios.rationale: Baseline gives generic HA/backup checklist; treatment specifies 99.95% SLO, regional GKE/Cloud SQL, HPA min=3 PDB minAvailable=2, readiness probe with DB check, SLO burn-rate alerts, and quarterly Backup-and-DR restore drills per the skill's Example 1.

scenarios.name: Diagnose checkout failures with green dashboards
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reaches for RUM and 5xx logs; treatment names the cause-vs-symptom anti-pattern, prescribes the 14.4x/6x/3x/1x multi-window burn-rate alerts, and adds circuit breaker + retries-with-jitter for downstream flakiness as the skill prescribes.
